hook: Being funny matters less than being easy to enjoy being around.
body: People often remember the emotional climate you created more than the technical quality of your jokes.

hook: Men who chase funny can become less present, less responsive, and less attractive than men who simply stay alive in the moment.
body: Aim for liveliness, not stand-up. People often remember the emotional climate you created more than the technical quality of your jokes.
A relaxed exchange with occasional humor usually builds more real attraction than a set of practiced bits.

hook: A relaxed exchange with occasional humor usually builds more real attraction than a set of practiced bits.
body: Focus on making the interaction feel alive instead of trying to prove that you are the funniest person there.
